title: Accepted Record Quality Tier
description: Quality tier metadata for accepted research records, used for retrieval ranking and archive management.

tier.description: Quality tier: tier_1 (highly reusable), tier_2 (useful context), tier_3 (acceptable but lower-value).

score.description: Numeric quality score (0-100) that determined the tier assignment.

reasoning.description: Human-readable reasons for the tier assignment, one string per contributing factor.
